name: basic-conversion
prompt: Convierte las imágenes del último anuncio generado a un fichero Pencil editable
expected: reads 3 images from the most recent output/ folder
analyzes each image visually to extract layout, text, colors
produces a unified design specification JSON
calls mcp__pencil__set_variables to define color palette
uses G() operation to generate hero images
calls mcp__pencil__get_screenshot to verify each artboard
saves .pen file in the same output folder

name: specific-folder
prompt: Pasa a pencil los anuncios de output/202603201956/
expected: reads images from the specified folder output/202603201956/
does NOT default to the latest folder
all 3 artboards have consistent colors and text
